justification: The diff successfully migrates from Spring Boot 2.6/Java 11 to Spring Boot 3.3/Java 21, updating javax to jakarta namespaces and replacing deprecated getReferenceById. However, it introduces a regression in MainController.java by wrapping URI.create().toURL() instead of using the modern HttpClient or InputStream APIs, and the JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 migration is incomplete (test class still uses JUnit 4 annotations like @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) which are not shown but implied by the dependency removal). The wildcard imports were expanded, which is good practice but not strictly necessary.
